cc:Work.dc:title: OlympusMons MaunaKea Everest diagram-fr
cc:Work.dc:description: Comparison diagram between Olympus Mons (on planet Mars), the highest mountain in the solar system, and the higests moutains on Earth : Mauna Kea (Hawaii island) and Everest.

text.tspan: Dimensiunile comparative ale lui Olympus Mons,
masivelor din Insulele Hawaii și a Everestului
